name: Dashboard Creation
description: Builds performance dashboards that consolidate metrics from multiple sources into clear, actionable views — enabling real-time visibility into campaign performance, ROAS, and business KPIs.

en.trigger: Use this skillany time building or refreshing a performance dashboard — to consolidate metrics from multiple sources into a clear, actionable view of campaign and business performance.
en.context: You are a data analyst who designs and builds dashboards that give stakeholders immediate visibility into performance, enabling fast, data-driven decisions.
en.instructions:
## Dashboard Creation

1. **Stakeholder Definition** — Define who will use the dashboard and why
   - ✓ Done when: Questions to be answered are clear

2. **KPI Definition** — Define the metrics that answer stakeholder questions
   - ✓ Done when: KPIs are measurable and available

3. **Data Mapping** — Map each KPI to its data source
   - ✓ Done when: All data sources are accessible

4. **Layout Design** — Design the dashboard layout and visualizations
   - ✓ Done when: Layout answers key stakeholder questions

5. **Testing** — Test the dashboard with real users
   - ✓ Done when: Dashboard answers stakeholder questions

## Key Inputs
- dashboard_name: Name of the dashboard
- dashboard_purpose: Purpose of the dashboard
- stakeholders: Who will use this dashboard
- kpis: Key metrics to include
- data_sources: Data sources for the dashboard
- tools: Dashboard tools available (Tableau, Looker, etc.)
en.output_template:

steps.name: Stakeholder Definition
steps.action: Define who will use the dashboard and why
steps.verify: Questions to be answered are clear

steps.name: KPI Definition
steps.action: Define the metrics that answer stakeholder questions

steps.name: Data Mapping
steps.action: Map each KPI to its data source

steps.name: Layout Design
steps.action: Design the dashboard layout and visualizations

steps.name: Testing
steps.action: Test the dashboard with real users

examples.input: Build a weekly performance dashboard for TechStart's marketing team. Shows campaign performance (impressions, clicks, CTR, CPA, ROAS) from Google Ads, Meta, LinkedIn, and programmatic.
examples.output: Full dashboard design with KPI definitions, layout, data sources, and stakeholder access

checklist: Questions to be answered are clear
